questions.question_text: You are required to prepare Income Statement for the period ending 31st December, 2019.
Show the journal entries, if K pays for the goodwill in cash.
Show the journal entries, if he is unable to bring the cash for the goodwill.
Calculate the annual depreciation expense by applying sum of the year digit method.
Pass journal entries and prepare depreciation schedule. Also state the assumptions of this method.
Prepare job order cost sheet. Calculate sales price of the job, assuming that it has been contracted with a mark-up of 40% of cost.
Compute the company’s CM ratio and variable expense ratio.
Compute the company’s breakeven point in both units and sales rupees.
The cost of production report for Department 2 for April.
What is the overhead applied during the year?
